inline_comments.message: LOG.error perhaps ? Since this would already mean ps_link was absent and the cloud region information is also missing.

Please confirm that the body looking similar in terms of the complex and other structures that we look for within it: 

Especially, 
(a) related_to = "complex"
 search_key = "complex.physical-location-id"

(b) It has no more than one complex. If it has more than one complex it will trigger the following block:

if len(complex_list) > 1:
                            if not self.match_vserver_attribute(complex_list):
                                self._log_multiple_item_error(
                                    name, service_type, related_to, search_key,
                                    "GENERIC-VNF", vnf)
                                continue

Hi Shankar for a) the body looks like what you mentioned.
b) Yes this is an issue. I don't see a good solution for this. This would also mean that this workaround will not work in that situation as we have no way to determine which complex to pick

Logically, there shouldn't be more than one complex per cloud-region (this is basically an openstack instance), since a cloud-region resides within a complex in the AAI hierarchy. So I'm guessing we can go with this assumption for now.
